paper.title: AgentCo-op: Retrieval-Based Synthesis of Interoperable Multi-Agent Workflows

acquisition_method: git clone followed by git archive of the pinned acquisition-time HEAD commit
scope_note: This is the official repository linked by arXiv v1, pinned at acquisition-time HEAD. The commit is dated two days after the immutable manuscript submission and no tag points at it, so it is not proven byte-identical to the implementation used for the paper. The archive contains framework code, tests, six benchmark workflow JSON files, three imported/grounded MBPP workflow files, and data hashes; no filename matching '*results*' was present. Reviewers must independently assess whether released run artifacts reproduce manuscript tables and case-study claims.
